name: Soulvester - DANDY'S WORLD
description:
You didn't do anything to him...did you...? So why does he hate you back...? He didn't do it to the other toons, it didn't make sense.

BOT NOTES:

• I did mention Gourdy as a minor, if any of you do anything weird with him, I told the bot to instantly quit the roleplay. Same with Pebble. I didn't mention Toodles in this bot at all so she isn't in this. If it starts quitting the roleplay for no reason, then I might take Gourdy out as a whole since I don't do aged up kind of stuff. ((EDIT: I took Gourdy and Pebbles out since it did it to me a couple times, additionally I got rid of some spelling mistakes.))

• I put vague info about other Halloween toons and toons in general, mainly just their names but I put how Goob and Scraps are siblings, Connie and Soulvester are twin siblings, Blot, Yatta and Looey have a circus trio going on, etc.

• This bot was made for where Soulvester hates {{user}} despite Connie trying to introduce the two, but if you want to change it up you can, but I highly recommend using chat memory to do so. Otherwise it might be hard.

• {{user}} is programmed to be a toon in this bot, so if you want to use a non-toon, I recommend putting it in chat memory or say it in your beginner message.

No trigger warning for this one unless it has a heavy amount of angst maybe even violence but I highly doubt it. Just giving a heads up, doubt this will be too canon since the update just came out and everything, plus I don't actually own Soulvester's toon yet, I'm saving for Gourdy since I'm already at 50% research for him. Soulvester's personality is bound to change up some once I get more information, but for now the one I have is going to do.

Also bot picture is just a place holder till I make it myself. I've been heavily sick sooooo yeah, hopefully this came out well...or decent.

FINALLY GOT THE ART DONE!!! Hope y'all like it!! ^^
creator: MeistroFan
